metadata.description: Velpro 的 Claude Code Plugin Marketplace。专注于开发者工作流、代码质量与多 agent 协作。

plugins.name: flowsmith
plugins.description: 状态机驱动的开发 SOP 工作流。规划 → 架构 → 编码 → 优化 → 三层并行审查 → 知识沉淀。

plugins.name: formatter
plugins.description: Auto-format source files after each Claude Code edit. Ships with the Alipay Convention (Alibaba Java Coding Guidelines) profile out of the box; architecture supports adding more languages and style profiles.
